features.evidence: I should note that the USB-C port can handle both video and power delivery I would have preferred another USB-C jack and a power supply with USB-C output
It came with Windows 11 Pro I was backed up on OneDrive, and the machine started loading my files and settings as soon as I logged in to my Microsoft account
It is fast and well-designed Weight is great not as heavy very light functions at the top of its class need it for my work which requires alotof Apps open
And it is a touch-screen Apart from that great product thought the screen would have been a little wider as well I love the touch screen component
I should note that the USB-C port can handle both video and power delivery I recently learned that you can buy a new Dell with one USB-C port that does not have video capability
I also like that the build quality feels premium and the battery can last many hours for normal use

Everything is great speed was my main concern lovebthebfeariews except one where I had to get an extension to hook up the ethernet cable It has a beautiful high-resolution display and very strong performance, so it handles school work, creative projects, and multitasking easily
I like the numeric keyboard and the fact that it's back-lit
